message:
fix(caut): route caut.v1 envelope to correct parser path

CautUsage/CautRefresh have #[serde(flatten)] HashMap extras which
absorbs ALL unknown JSON fields, causing any valid JSON object to
parse successfully — even caut.v1 envelopes with camelCase field
names (generatedAt vs generated_at). This meant the v1 fallback
path was never reached, leaving generated_at/refreshed_at as None.

Fix: check for "schemaVersion" discriminator before attempting
direct CautUsage/CautRefresh parse. When present, skip directly
to CautV1Envelope deserialization which handles camelCase fields
via #[serde(rename)].

Fixes 2 test failures:
- parse_usage_supports_caut_v1_schema
- parse_refresh_supports_caut_v1_schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
